items.promptRawJa: Si, en se lançant au secours de personnes accidentées, l'automobiliste fait perdre la trace des circonstances de l'accident, il doit marquer l'emplacement initial de ce qu'il a modifié.
items.promptGlossEn: If, when going to help injured persons, the driver destroys evidence of the accident's circumstances, they must mark the original position of what they changed.
items.reviewerNotes: Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: No close candidate match found. Source is a valid road-accident rule (mark original position if you moved evidence while assisting); not represented in top candidates — create new question. Local correct option is Yes=A.
